task: put the pink block inside the right cabinet
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A pink block is on a yellow surface. A white cabinet with an open right door is visible. The cabinet interior is empty. The pink block is a cube with a matte finish. STRATEGY - First, reach for the pink block to grasp it. Then, transport it to the open right cabinet. Finally, place the block inside the cabinet. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the cabinet interior. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pink block at its body for initial contact. Step 2 grasp the pink block at its body for a secure hold. Step 3 transport the block to the cabinet's interior. Step 4 place the block inside the cabinet's interior.
Goal: inside(pink_block, right_cabinet)
Scene: pink_block, right_cabinet, yellow_surface
Step 1: reach(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> right_cabinet)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the right cabinet
  spatial: inside(pink_block, right_cabinet) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: inside(pink_block, right_cabinet)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> right_cabinet)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the right cabinet
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, right_cabinet) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, right_cabinet) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pink block
the body of the pink block
an empty area inside the right cabinet
an empty area inside the right cabinet
